votes.rationale: Motion-0044 successfully established the first reusable validation-preset layer for Claude code-edit sessions in dev-jai-nexus. The repo now has compact local check profiles, supporting guidance, and a session validation checklist that reduce repeated validation briefing while preserving operator judgment.

The motion stayed tightly scoped. It did not drift into automation, CI orchestration, or generator redesign, and instead turned repeated live-session lessons into a compact reusable guidance layer for future Claude work.

The implementation is coherent and practically useful. The validation presets now give dev-jai-nexus a reusable session aid that makes future code-edit setup more explicit, repeatable, and lower-friction while keeping canonical truth anchored in repo source, motion artifacts, and actual command results.
